risks.name: Inability to maintain individual accountability
risks.description: The inability to maintain accountability (e.g., asset ownership, non-repudiation of actions or inactions, etc.).

risks.name: Improper assignment of privileged functions
risks.description: The inability to implement least privileges (e.g., Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), Privileged Account Management (PAM), etc.).

risks.name: Privilege escalation
risks.description: The inability to restrict access to privileged functions.

risks.name: Unauthorized access
risks.description: The inability to restrict access to only authorized individuals, groups or services.

risks.name: Lost, damaged or stolen asset(s)
risks.description: Lost, damaged or stolen assets.

risks.name: Loss of integrity through unauthorized changes
risks.description: Unauthorized changes that corrupt the integrity of the system / application / service.

risks.name: Emergent properties and/or unintended consequences
risks.description: Emergent properties and/or unintended consequences from Artificial Intelligence & Autonomous Technologies (AAT).

risks.name: Business interruption
risks.description: Increased latency, or a service outage, that negatively impact business operations.

risks.name: Data loss / corruption
risks.description: The inability to maintain the confidentiality of the data (compromise) or prevent data corruption (loss).

risks.name: Reduction in productivity
risks.description: Diminished user productivity.

risks.name: Information loss / corruption or system compromise due to technical attack
risks.description: A technical attack that compromises data, systems, applications or services (e.g., malware, phishing, hacking, etc.).

risks.name: Information loss / corruption or system compromise due to non‐technical attack
risks.description: A non-technical attack that compromises data, systems, applications or services (e.g., social engineering, sabotage, etc.).

risks.name: Loss of revenue
risks.description: A negative impact on the ability to generate revenue (e.g., a loss of clients or an inability to generate future revenue).

risks.name: Cancelled contract
risks.description: A cancelled contract with a client or other entity for cause (e.g., failure to fulfill obligations for secure practices).

risks.name: Diminished competitive advantage
risks.description: Diminished competitive advantage (e.g., lose market share, internal dysfunction, etc.).

risks.name: Diminished reputation
risks.description: Diminished brand value (e.g., tarnished reputation).

risks.name: Fines and judgements
risks.description: Financial damages due to fines and/or judgements from statutory / regulatory / contractual non-compliance.

risks.name: Unmitigated vulnerabilities
risks.description: Unmitigated technical vulnerabilities that lack compensating controls or other mitigation actions.

risks.name: System compromise
risks.description: A compromise of a system, application or service that affects confidentiality, integrity, availability and/or safety.

risks.name: Inability to support business processes
risks.description: Insufficient cybersecurity and/or privacy practices that cannot securely support the organization's technologies & processes.

risks.name: Incorrect controls scoping
risks.description: Missing or incorrect cybersecurity and/or privacy controls due to incorrect or inadequate control scoping practices.

risks.name: Lack of roles & responsibilities
risks.description: Insufficient cybersecurity and/or privacy roles & responsibilities that cannot securely support the organization's technologies & processes.

risks.name: Inadequate internal practices
risks.description: Insufficient cybersecurity and/or privacy practices that can securely support the organization's technologies & processes.

risks.name: Inadequate third-party practices
risks.description: Insufficient Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management (C-SCRM) practices that cannot securely support the organization's technologies & processes.

risks.name: Lack of oversight of internal controls
risks.description: The inability to demonstrate appropriate evidence of due diligence and due care in overseeing the organization's internal cybersecurity and/or privacy controls.

risks.name: Lack of oversight of third-party controls
risks.description: The inability to demonstrate appropriate evidence of due diligence and due care in overseeing third-party cybersecurity and/or privacy controls.

risks.name: Illegal content or abusive action
risks.description: Disruptive content or actions that negatively affect business operations (e.g., abusive content, harmful speech, threats of violence, illegal content, etc.).

risks.name: Inability to investigate / prosecute incidents
risks.description: Insufficient incident response practices that prevent the organization from investigating and/or prosecuting incidents (e.g., chain of custody corruption, available sources of evidence, etc.).

risks.name: Improper response to incidents
risks.description: The inability to appropriately respond to incidents in a timely manner.

risks.name: Ineffective remediation actions
risks.description: The inability to ensure incident response actions were correct and/or effective.

risks.name: Expense associated with managing a loss event
risks.description: Financial repercussions from responding to an incident or loss.

risks.name: Inability to maintain situational awareness
risks.description: The inability to detect cybersecurity and/or privacy incidents (e.g., a lack of situational awareness).

risks.name: Lack of a security-minded workforce
risks.description: The inability to appropriately educate and train personnel to foster a security-minded workforce.

risks.name: Third-party cybersecurity exposure
risks.description: Loss of Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability and/or Safety (CIAS) from third-party cybersecurity practices, vulnerabilities and/or incidents that affects the supply chain through impacted products and/or services.

risks.name: Third-party physical security exposure
risks.description: Loss of Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability and/or Safety (CIAS) from physical security exposure of third-party structures, facilities and/or other physical assets that affects the supply chain through impacted products and/or services.

risks.name: Third-party supply chain relationships, visibility and controls
risks.description: Loss of Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability and/or Safety (CIAS) from "downstream" third-party relationships, visibility and controls that affect the supply chain through impacted products and/or services.

risks.name: Third-party compliance / legal exposure
risks.description: The inability to maintain compliance due to third-party non-compliance, criminal acts, or other relevant legal action(s).

risks.name: Use of product / service
risks.description: The misuse of the product / service in a manner that it was not designed or how it was approved for use.

risks.name: Reliance on the third-party
risks.description: The inability to continue business operations, due to the reliance on the third-party product and/or service.
